name: Sarah
observedShift: they want to move to Head of

focusPoints.label: Path to Head of UX role readiness.
focusPoints.reason: Sarah's interest in moving to a Head of UX role makes growth planning crucial. Discussing the skills and experiences she needs to develop will help her prepare for this transition.

focusPoints.label: Delegation as a leadership skill for next steps.
focusPoints.reason: For a UX Lead aiming for a Head role, effective delegation is critical — it's about scaling impact through others rather than direct contributions.

focusPoints.label: Building trust with cross-functional leaders.
focusPoints.reason: As a future Head of UX, Sarah will need to manage relationships beyond her immediate team. Engaging effectively with cross-functional leaders is essential for this transition.

focusPoints.label: Strategic impact & leverage in current role.
focusPoints.reason: For career growth, demonstrating strategic impact and leverage in her current role will be vital. This is what will set her apart as ready for the next step.
